sentences.translationEn: The grandfather said: «Choose the neighbor before the house».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْجَارَ الطَّيِّبَ أَهَمُّ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ الْجَمِيلِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da je dobar komšija važniji od lijepe kuće.
sentences.translationEn: This means that a good neighbor is more important than a beautiful house.

sentences.translation: Komšija je pomogao starijoj ženi kada se razbolila.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbor helped the old woman when she got sick.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ بِالسَّعَادَةِ لِأَنَّ لَهَا جِيرَانًا طَيِّبِينَ.
sentences.translation: Osjećala se sretno jer ima dobre komšije.
sentences.translationEn: She felt happy because she has good neighbors.
